name: LLM Wiki — Tech Blog (AI Labs & Engineering)
noteContentFormat:
> [!info]+ Raw Source — Pending Ingest
> Company blog post. Author is typically embedded in the content body as "A note from [Name], [Title]" or at the end as "Written by [Name], [Team]" — extract during `/ingest`. OG metadata (description/image/published) is usually well populated. Anthropic's claude.com/blog also exposes schema:@BlogPosting.

## Original Content

{{content}}
context: Corporate tech/AI blog post — OpenAI (openai.com/index), Anthropic (claude.com/blog, anthropic.com/news + /engineering), DeepMind, Hugging Face, Vercel, etc. Distinct from 'tech-docs' (reference material) and 'news' (third-party outlets). Character: company self-publishing about product launches, strategic announcements, research. Metadata is usually clean (description/image populated). Author is often in content body. `published_raw` stored as text (not date) because formats vary: OpenAI returns ISO (2026-04-02T10:30), Anthropic returns loose strings (Apr 02). Schema:@BlogPosting is preferred when available (Anthropic) — falls back to OG/basic vars (OpenAI).
